cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 4.3.0)
set(CMAKE_MODULE_PATH "")
set(_CMAKE_CHECK_ENABLED_LANGUAGES "C;CXX;RC")
set(CMAKE_C_COMPILER "C:/Program Files (x86)/Intel/oneAPI/compiler/latest/bin/icx.exe")
set(CMAKE_C_COMPILER_ID "IntelLLVM")
set(CMAKE_C_COMPILER_LOADED 1)
set(CMAKE_C_COMPILER_VERSION "2025.3.2")
set(CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER "C:/Program Files (x86)/Intel/oneAPI/compiler/latest/bin/icx.exe")
set(CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_ID "IntelLLVM")
set(CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_LOADED 1)
set(CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_VERSION "2025.3.2")
set(CMAKE_RC_COMPILER "C:/Program Files (x86)/Windows Kits/10/bin/10.0.26100.0/x64/rc.exe")
set(CMAKE_RC_COMPILER_ID "")
set(CMAKE_RC_COMPILER_LOADED 1)
set(CMAKE_RC_COMPILER_VERSION "")

project(CheckHIP LANGUAGES HIP)
file(WRITE "${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/result.cmake" "set(CMAKE_HIP_COMPILER \"${CMAKE_HIP_COMPILER}\")
set(CMAKE_HIP_HOST_COMPILER \"${CMAKE_HIP_HOST_COMPILER}\")
set(CMAKE_HIP_PLATFORM \"${CMAKE_HIP_PLATFORM}\")
")
